key_developments.headline: Iranian missiles injure 180 in towns near Israeli nuclear site
key_developments.detail: Israel's health ministry says 180 people were injured - some seriously - in Iranian missile strikes on two southern Israeli towns close to a nuclear facility. The ministry says 116 people were injured
